steps.name: 29. Generate Tradesman email and open a new Mailsac inbox tab
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Join as a Tradesperson' })
30. Navigate to TradeMate home and go to Tradesperson registration
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Enter the verification code we send you on:')
31. Fill Tradesman registration form and submit
